code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  let s = match line
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut total = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut stop = false
  while i < parts.len() and not stop
    let tok = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if n < 0
      stop = true
    else
      total = total + n
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  println("partial=#{total}")
end
